title: 1000 Pieces Rose Petals, Artificial Silk Flowers Petal Romantic Decorations, Emulation Ros for Wedding Decoration, Valentine's Day, Confession Decoration (Navy)
features: These rose petals are made from polyester silk
Package includes 1000 pieces of rose petals

description: Product description Create a romantic and unforgettable atmosphere with these 1000 pieces of artificial rose petals. Made from soft silk fabric, these petals look and feel just like real roses, adding elegance and charm to any occasion. Perfect for weddings, proposals, anniversaries, Valentine’s Day, or romantic surprises. Use them to decorate tables, aisles, beds, or gift boxes — they’re lightweight, reusable, and won’t wilt or stain surfaces. Easy to scatter and beautifully realistic, these petals are ideal for turning any moment into something truly special. Safety Warning 3+
